name: E-2 options schema: doctor --explain --tree emits resolved_options as JSON when a rule has options_schema
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-100
    options_schema:
      properties:
        budget_kb:
          default: 250
' > tree/g/rules.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-ts-100: error
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-100 --profile p.yaml --tree tree 2>err.txt; grep -q 'resolved_options=' err.txt && grep -q 'budget_kb' err.txt && echo resolved 1>&2
